options.name: --format
options.description:
Output format for release notes
Values: markdown (default), json, html, csv

options.name: --audience
options.description:
Target audience mode for tone control
Values: client (non-technical), internal (technical, default)

options.name: --ai
options.description:
Enable AI-powered summarization and enhancement
Requires OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable

options.name: --tone
options.description:
AI tone style for generated content (requires --ai)
Values: professional (default), casual, marketing, technical

options.name: --owner
options.description:
GitHub repository owner (username or organization)
Can be set in .releasecraftrc.json config file

options.name: --token
options.description:
GitHub personal access token (PAT)
If not provided, reads from GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path (if not specified, writes to console)
